description_long: This cash register features a robust, rectangular body with a matte black finish and metallic silver accents along the top edges. The front panel is adorned with two prominent blue fleur-de-lis symbols, adding a decorative touch. At the center, a raised section houses a display screen, which is slightly angled for easy viewing by the operator. The register includes a recessed area likely intended for a keypad and transaction interface, though the keys themselves are not visible. The sides and back are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the sturdy, secure construction typical of commercial cash registers. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in urban retail or service environments.
description: A sturdy, black and silver cash register with blue fleur-de-lis symbols and a central display screen, designed for urban retail use. Its robust build and decorative front make it both functional and visually distinctive.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, recessed transaction area, and two blue fleur-de-lis symbols on the black body.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the thickness of the body and the angled display screen, with a partial blue symbol visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, unadorned black surface with the raised central section visible at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body depth, angled display, and a partial blue symbol.
